description: Legal document. Fragment (left side). Location: Fusṭāṭ. Dating: 1160–66 CE, as the reshut clause invokes the Gaʾon Netanʾel ha-Levi (r. 1160–66). Concerning the sale of meat and its ritual purity, and how someone will not partner with a gentile. There might be someone named Dāʾūd (l. 6). Signed by various people including Moshe b. Shelomo and Yaʾir b. Shemuʾel. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
